mapper.select: SELECT a.file_type, a.issue, a.file_size, c.tree_id FROM `htht_cluster_schedule_product_file_info` a left Join htht_cluster_schedule_product_info b on a.product_info_id = b.id left Join htht_cluster_schedule_product c on c.id = b.product_id

SELECT sum(a.file_size) FROM `htht_cluster_schedule_product_file_info` a left Join htht_cluster_schedule_product_info b on a.product_info_id = b.id left Join htht_cluster_schedule_product c on c.id = b.product_id;
